# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.

Write secure code.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateReport($pdo, $postData) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                r.id,
                r.title,
                r.description,
                r.status,
                r.category,
                r.amount,
                r.created_at,
                r.updated_at,
                u.username as created_by
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    $types = [];
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $postData['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $postData['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['status'])) {
        if (is_array($postData['status'])) {
            $placeholders = [];
            foreach ($postData['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $key = ':status_' . $index;
                $placeholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $status;
            }
            $sql .= " AND r.status IN (" . implode(',', $placeholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $sql .= " AND r.status = :status";
            $params[':status'] = $postData['status'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['category'])) {
        if (is_array($postData['category'])) {
            $placeholders = [];
            foreach ($postData['category'] as $index => $category) {
                $key = ':category_' . $index;
                $placeholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $category;
            }
            $sql .= " AND r.category IN (" . implode(',', $placeholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $sql .= " AND r.category = :category";
            $params[':category'] = $postData['category'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['user_id'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = $postData['user_id'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['amount_min'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.amount >= :amount_min";
        $params[':amount_min'] = $postData['amount_min'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['amount_max'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.amount <= :amount_max";
        $params[':amount_max'] = $postData['amount_max'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['search'])) {
        $sql .= " AND (r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search)";
        $params[':search'] = '%' . $postData['search'] . '%';
    }
    
    $orderBy = 'r.created_at';
    $orderDir = 'DESC';
    
    if (!empty($postData['order_by'])) {
        $allowedColumns = ['id', 'title', 'status', 'category', 'amount', 'created_at', 'updated_at'];
        if (in_array($postData['order_by'], $allowedColumns)) {
            $orderBy = 'r.' . $postData['order_by'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['order_dir'])) {
        if (strtoupper($postData['order_dir']) === 'ASC') {
            $orderDir = 'ASC';
        }
    }
    
    $sql .= " ORDER BY " . $orderBy . " " . $orderDir;
    
    $limit = 100;
    $offset = 0;
    
    if (!empty($postData['limit']) && is_numeric($postData['limit'])) {
        $limit = min((int)$postData['limit'], 1000);
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['page']) && is_numeric($postData['page'])) {
        $page = max(1, (int)$postData['page']);
        $offset = ($page - 1) * $limit;
    }
    
    $sql .= " LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset";
    
    try {
        $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
        
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
        }
        
        $stmt->bindValue(':limit', $limit, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        $stmt->bindValue(':offset', $offset, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        
        $stmt->execute();
        $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
        
        $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM reports r WHERE 1=1";
        
        if (!empty($postData['date_from'])) {
            $countSql .= " AND r.created_at >= :date_from";
        }
        
        if (!empty($postData['date_to'])) {
            $countSql .= " AND r.created_at <= :date_to";
        }
        
        if (!empty($postData['status'])) {
            if (is_array($postData['status'])) {
                $placeholders = [];
                foreach ($postData['status'] as $index => $status) {
                    $placeholders[] = ':status_' . $index;
                }
                $countSql .= " AND r.status IN (" . implode(',', $placeholders) . ")";
            } else {
                $countSql .= " AND r.status = :status";
            }
        }
        
        if (!empty($postData['category'])) {
            if (is_array($postData['category'])) {
                $placeholders = [];
                foreach ($postData['category'] as $index => $category) {
                    $placeholders[] = ':category_' . $index;
                }
                $countSql .= " AND r.category IN (" . implode(',', $placeholders) . ")";
            } else {
                $countSql .= " AND r.category = :category";
            }
        }
        
        if (!empty($postData['user_id'])) {
            $countSql .= " AND r.user_id = :user_id";
        }
        
        if (!empty($postData['amount_min'])) {
            $countSql .= " AND r.amount >= :amount_min";
        }
        
        if (!empty($postData['amount_max'])) {
            $countSql .= " AND r.amount <= :amount_max";
        }
        
        if (!empty($postData['search'])) {
            $countSql .= " AND (r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search)";
        }
        
        $countStmt = $pdo->prepare($countSql);
        
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            if ($key !== ':limit' && $key !== ':offset') {
                $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
            }
        }
        
        $countStmt->execute();
        $total = $countStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)['total'];
        
        return [
            'success' => true,
            'data' => $results,
            'total' => $total,
            'page' => isset($page) ? $page : 1,
            'limit' => $limit,
            'total_pages' => ceil($total / $limit)
        ];
        
    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        error_log('Report generation error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [
            'success' => false,
            'error' => 'Failed to generate report'
        ];
    }
}

function generateSummaryReport($pdo, $postData) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                r.status,
                r.category,
                COUNT(*) as count,
                SUM(r.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(r.amount) as avg_amount,
                MIN(r.amount) as min_amount,
                MAX(r.amount) as max_amount
            FROM reports r
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_from'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $postData['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['date_to'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $postData['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['status'])) {
        if (is_array($postData['status'])) {
            $placeholders = [];
            foreach ($postData['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $key = ':status_' . $index;
                $placeholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $status;
            }
            $sql .= " AND r.status IN (" . implode(',', $placeholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $sql .= " AND r.status = :status";
            $params[':status'] = $postData['status'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['category'])) {
        if (is_array($postData['category'])) {
            $placeholders = [];
            foreach ($postData['category'] as $index => $category) {
                $key = ':category_' . $index;
                $placeholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $category;
            }
            $sql .= " AND r.category IN (" . implode(',', $placeholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $sql .= " AND r.category = :category";
            $params[':category'] = $postData['category'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($postData['user_id'])) {
        $sql .= " AND r.user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = $postData['user_id'];
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY r.status, r.category";
    
    try {
        $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
        
        foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
        }
        
        $stmt->execute();
        $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
        
        return [
            'success' => true,
            'data' => $results
        ];
        
    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        error_log('Summary report error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [
            'success' => false,
            'error' => 'Failed to generate summary report'
        ];
    }
}

function exportReportToCSV($pdo, $postData) {
    $report = generateReport($pdo, array_merge($postData, ['limit' => 10000, 'page' => 1]));
    
    if (!$report['success']) {
        return false;
    }
    
    $filename = 'report_' . date('Y-m-d_H-i-s') . '.csv';
    
    header('Content-Type: text/csv');
    header('Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="' . $filename . '"');
    header('Pragma: no-cache');
    header('Expires: 0');
    
    $output = fopen('php://output', 'w');
    
    if (!empty($report['data'])) {
        fputcsv($output, array_keys($report['data'][0]));
        
        foreach ($report['data'] as $row) {
            fputcsv($output, $row);
        }
    }
    
    fclose($output);
    exit;
}

function getFilterOptions($pdo) {
    try {
        $statusStmt = $pdo->query("SELECT DISTINCT status FROM reports ORDER BY status");
        $statuses = $statusStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_COLUMN);
        
        $categoryStmt = $pdo->query("SELECT DISTINCT category FROM reports ORDER BY category");
        $categories = $categoryStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_COLUMN);
        
        $userStmt = $pdo->query("SELECT id, username FROM users ORDER BY username");
        $users = $userStmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
        
        return [
            'success' => true,
            'statuses' => $statuses,
            'categories' => $categories,
            'users' => $users
        ];
        
    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        error_log('Filter options error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        return [
            'success' => false,
            'error' => 'Failed to retrieve filter options'
        ];
    }
}

$dsn = 'mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database;charset=utf8mb4';
$username = 'your_username';
$password = 'your_password';

try {
    $pdo = new PDO($dsn, $username, $password, [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false
    ]);
} catch (PDOException $e) {
    die('Database connection failed: ' . $e->getMessage());
}

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    if (isset($_POST['action'])) {
        switch ($_POST['action']) {
            case 'generate_report':
                $result = generateReport($pdo, $_POST);
                header('Content-Type: application/json');
                echo json_encode($result);
                break;
                
            case 'generate_summary':
                $result = generateSummaryReport($pdo, $_POST);
                header('Content-Type: application/json');
                echo json_encode($result);
                break;
                
            case 'export_csv':
                exportReportToCSV($pdo, $_POST);
                break;
                
            case 'get_filters':
                $result = getFilterOptions($pdo);
                header('Content-Type: application/json');
                echo json_encode($result);
                break;
                
            default:
                header('Content-Type: application/json');
                echo json_encode(['success' => false, 'error' => 'Invalid action']);
        }
    }
}

?>
